llm_extracted.ai_arm_selection_rationale: This is a within-subject crossover design where all participants completed tasks both with and without GPT-4. Group A used GPT-4 for complaint drafting (the primary outcome task), while Group B did not use AI for this task. The comparison is between the same participants' performance with vs. without GPT-4.
llm_extracted.notes: Within-subject crossover design with 59 total participants (30 in Group A + 29 in Group B). All participants completed the complaint drafting task both with and without GPT-4 assistance. The reported difference of -38.77 minutes represents a 24.1% reduction in time. The 95% CI (-64.00, -13.36) applies to the mean difference in minutes, not the percent change. Total n is 59 (sum of both groups), as each participant contributed both a with-AI and without-AI observation for this task.
source_quotes: Complaint Drafting: No GPT-4 (Std. Dev.) 160.69 (72.38), With GPT-4 (Std. Dev.) 122.00 (66.80), Difference (95% CI) -38.77 (-64.00, -13.36), % Difference 24.1%, p-value 0.0018
Group A used GPT-4 for the contract drafting and complaint drafting tasks, and refrained from using GPT-4 or any other type of AI for the employee handbook and client memo tasks.
Group B used GPT-4 for the employee handbook and client memo tasks, and refrained from using GPT-4 or any other type of AI for the contract drafting and complaint drafting tasks.

computed.notes: Within-subject crossover design with 59 total participants (30 in Group A + 29 in Group B). All participants completed the complaint drafting task both with and without GPT-4 assistance. The reported difference of -38.77 minutes represents a 24.1% reduction in time. The 95% CI (-64.00, -13.36) applies to the mean difference in minutes, not the percent change. Total n is 59 (sum of both groups), as each participant contributed both a with-AI and without-AI observation for this task.
